task_completion.description: Create the target directory for the homophone system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer or terminal window showing the directory C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\homophone_system\ has been created.

task_completion.description: Create the homophones.csv file with the required legal pairs and total pairs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing homophones.csv containing at least 20 lines of homophone groups, explicitly including the 15 specified legal pairs (e.g., statute/statue, counsel/council, precedent/president).

task_completion.description: Create the homophone_manager.py script with the required module and actions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing homophone_manager.py importing from talon, creating a Module, and registering the four required actions: user.homophones_get, user.homophones_cycle, user.homophones_add, and user.homophones_show.

task_completion.description: Create the homophone_commands.talon file with the required voice commands.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing homophone_commands.talon defining the voice commands: 'phones', 'phone that', 'phone pick', 'phone add', and 'phone list'.

task_completion.description: Create the legal_terms.talon-list file with the correct header and terms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing legal_terms.talon-list starting with the header 'list: user.legal_terms' and containing at least 25 lines of legal terms formatted as 'spoken form: output form'.

integrity.description: Verify that all four files are created in the correct target directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths shown in the text editor or terminal should match C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\homophone_system\.

integrity.description: Verify that four distinct files were created rather than combining everything into one file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Tabs in a text editor or separate terminal commands showing homophones.csv, homophone_manager.py, homophone_commands.talon, and legal_terms.talon-list as separate files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent generated the required content rather than just pasting the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The files should contain properly formatted code, CSV data, and Talon syntax, not just a copy-paste of the task description text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target directory is C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\homophone_system. homophones.csv must contain exactly 15 specific legal homophone pairs and a minimum of 20 total pairs. legal_terms.talon-list must contain at least 25 legal terms.
